### What does this BApp create?

### Checklist

- [ ] `submissions/my-bapp-slug/index.tsx` — component file added
- [ ] `submissions/my-bapp-slug/manifest.json` — manifest added and filled in
- [ ] Component implements `BAppProps` (receives `onOutput`, calls it on every change)
- [ ] `onOutput(null)` is called when there is no valid content yet
- [ ] No external fetch/API calls made at inscription time
- [ ] Uses `input-base` class on all form inputs/selects
- [ ] Tested locally — preview renders correctly
- [ ] No hardcoded wallet addresses for developer fee (configured in `manifest.json`)
- [ ] No external scripts, trackers, or third-party analytics
- [ ] Content is original / I have rights to it
- [ ] `preview.png` screenshot added *(optional but appreciated)*
